steps.name: SAP FI
steps.description: SAP FI is the system of record that drives the GL close and feeds the Power BI dataset refresh.

steps.name: Late Close Risk
steps.description: Mitigated by escalating to the GL Accounting Lead within 4 hours of a missed close checkpoint; risk owner is Finance Operations.

rationale: Business Rule (GL Balance Rule) deliberately has no gap-answer step: per Phase 13's own [PROPOSAL ruling], the dataset's final coverage must land below 100% to match the spec's ~89% target, and leaving one Partial type unresolved is a more realistic worked example than a contrived full close.
note: DatasetValidator applies these two steps via services.graph_update.close_gap against a real running KVA, and records the measured coverage after each step in ground_truth/coverage_curve.json -- the target above is illustrative only.
